headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Question
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Robbins LLP Encourages IT Stockholders to Contact the Firm for Information About the Class Action Against Gartner, Inc.
summary: Robbins LLP reminds stockholders that a class action was filed on behalf of all investors who purchased or otherwise acquired Gartner, Inc. common stock between February 4, 2025 and February 2,...

headline: Allspring Common Stock Fund: Q1 2026 Top Contributors And Detractors
summary: Allspring Common Stock Fund underperformed its benchmark in Q1 2026 due to negative stock selection. Read the full analysis for more details.
